name: gogcli-mcp-sheets
description: Extended Google Sheets for Claude via gogcli — auth + full Sheets support

gog_account.title: Google Account
gog_account.description: Default Google account email (optional — uses gogcli's configured default if omitted)

gog_path.title: gog Executable Path
gog_path.description: Path to the gog executable (optional — defaults to 'gog' on your PATH)

tools.name: gog_auth_add
tools.description: Authorize a Google account via browser-based OAuth

tools.name: gog_auth_list
tools.description: List all Google accounts stored in gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_status
tools.description: Show gogcli auth configuration (keyring, credential files)

tools.name: gog_auth_services
tools.description: List Google services and OAuth scopes supported by gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_run
tools.description: Run any gog auth subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_sheets_get
tools.description: Read values from a Google Sheets range

tools.name: gog_sheets_update
tools.description: Write values to a Google Sheets range

tools.name: gog_sheets_append
tools.description: Append rows to a Google Sheet

tools.name: gog_sheets_clear
tools.description: Clear values in a Google Sheets range

tools.name: gog_sheets_metadata
tools.description: Get spreadsheet metadata (title, tabs, named ranges)

tools.name: gog_sheets_create
tools.description: Create a new Google Spreadsheet

tools.name: gog_sheets_find_replace
tools.description: Find and replace text across a spreadsheet

tools.name: gog_sheets_run
tools.description: Run any gog sheets subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_sheets_add_tab
tools.description: Add a new sheet tab to a spreadsheet.

tools.name: gog_sheets_delete_tab
tools.description: Delete a sheet tab from a spreadsheet.

tools.name: gog_sheets_rename_tab
tools.description: Rename a sheet tab.

tools.name: gog_sheets_copy
tools.description: Copy a spreadsheet to a new spreadsheet with the given title.

tools.name: gog_sheets_export
tools.description: Export a spreadsheet as CSV, TSV, or PDF.

tools.name: gog_sheets_freeze
tools.description: Freeze rows and/or columns in a sheet.

tools.name: gog_sheets_insert
tools.description: Insert rows or columns into a sheet.

tools.name: gog_sheets_copy_paste
tools.description: Copy a range's values/formulas/format to another range (tiles to fill down/across).

tools.name: gog_sheets_merge
tools.description: Merge cells in a range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_unmerge
tools.description: Unmerge previously merged cells in a range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_format
tools.description: Apply cell formatting to a range. Named flags (bold, italic, backgroundColor, etc.) compose to a Sheets CellFormat; pass formatJson for full control.

tools.name: gog_sheets_number_format
tools.description: Set number format on a range (currency, percentage, date, etc.). When type is DATE or DATE_TIME, peeks the target range first and warns if every numeric cell is a small integer (< 10000) — Sheets would render those as 1899/1900 day-serials. Pass force:true to skip the check.

tools.name: gog_sheets_read_format
tools.description: Read cell formatting for a range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_resize_columns
tools.description: Resize column widths. Use --auto for auto-fit or --width for a specific pixel width.

tools.name: gog_sheets_resize_rows
tools.description: Resize row heights. Use --auto for auto-fit or --height for a specific pixel height.

tools.name: gog_sheets_notes
tools.description: Read cell notes in a range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_update_note
tools.description: Add, update, or clear a cell note. Pass an empty string to clear the note.

tools.name: gog_sheets_links
tools.description: List hyperlinks in a range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_links_set
tools.description: Set native cell hyperlinks: single link, multi-link rich-text cell (runsJson), or batch (cellsJson).

tools.name: gog_sheets_validation_get
tools.description: Read data-validation rules (dropdowns, checkboxes, conditions) on a range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_validation_set
tools.description: Set a data-validation rule on a range: dropdowns, checkboxes, number/date conditions, or custom formulas.

tools.name: gog_sheets_validation_clear
tools.description: Remove all data-validation rules from a range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_delete_dimension
tools.description: Delete a row or column span, table-aware: intersecting tables are shrunk and their remaining data preserved.

tools.name: gog_sheets_named_ranges_list
tools.description: List all named ranges in a spreadsheet.

tools.name: gog_sheets_named_ranges_get
tools.description: Get a named range by name or ID.

tools.name: gog_sheets_named_ranges_add
tools.description: Create a new named range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_named_ranges_update
tools.description: Update a named range (change its name, range, or both).

tools.name: gog_sheets_named_ranges_delete
tools.description: Delete a named range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_list_tabs
tools.description: List tabs in a spreadsheet (sheetId, title, index, gridProperties)

tools.name: gog_sheets_batch_update
tools.description: Update values in multiple ranges atomically with one Sheets API request.

tools.name: gog_sheets_reorder_tab
tools.description: Move a tab to a specific 0-based position.

tools.name: gog_sheets_chart_list
tools.description: List embedded charts in a spreadsheet.

tools.name: gog_sheets_chart_get
tools.description: Get a chart's full definition (spec + position) by chart ID.

tools.name: gog_sheets_chart_create
tools.description: Create an embedded chart from a JSON ChartSpec.

tools.name: gog_sheets_chart_update
tools.description: Replace a chart's spec by chart ID.

tools.name: gog_sheets_chart_delete
tools.description: Delete a chart by chart ID.

tools.name: gog_sheets_table_list
tools.description: List Google Sheets tables in a spreadsheet.

tools.name: gog_sheets_table_get
tools.description: Get a Google Sheets table by table ID.

tools.name: gog_sheets_table_create
tools.description: Create a Google Sheets table over a range with typed columns.

tools.name: gog_sheets_table_append
tools.description: Append data rows to a table.

tools.name: gog_sheets_table_clear
tools.description: Clear all data rows from a table.

tools.name: gog_sheets_table_delete
tools.description: Delete a Google Sheets table. By default preserves the table's cell values and formulas (emulates "Convert to range"); set keep_data=false to also wipe the data.

tools.name: gog_sheets_snapshot
tools.description: Make a backup copy of an entire spreadsheet before a risky/destructive edit. Returns the copy's file ID and URL.

tools.name: gog_sheets_banding_list
tools.description: List alternating-color banded ranges.

tools.name: gog_sheets_banding_set
tools.description: Apply alternating colors to a range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_banding_clear
tools.description: Remove alternating-color banding by ID or for a whole sheet.

tools.name: gog_sheets_filter_set
tools.description: Set a basic filter on a range; replacing an existing filter requires replace=true.

tools.name: gog_sheets_conditional_format_list
tools.description: List conditional formatting rules.

tools.name: gog_sheets_conditional_format_add
tools.description: Add a conditional formatting rule to a range (boolean or gradient).

tools.name: gog_sheets_conditional_format_clear
tools.description: Remove conditional formatting rules from a sheet.
